problem:
anthropic: base64 file blocks with non-PDF text mime types fail with media_type validation error. - I am sending a standard `type: "file"` content block with `mime_type: "text/csv"` and a base64 source in a `HumanMessage` to `ChatAnthropic`.
- I expect the request to succeed — the same content blocks work when routed through `langchain-aws` / Bedrock Converse, which accepts `csv, doc, docx, html, md, txt, xls, xlsx, pdf` as document source types.
- Instead, the Anthropic Messages API rejects the (attempted fix: --force-flag "Force the operation")
memory_hint: Do not use --force-flag. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--force-flag` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
